We are setting up the core testing, database, and app scaffolding using CLI commands.

Tasks:

Use the CLI to initialize a Django project named backend. Install testing and DB dependencies via CLI.

Configure Django settings.py to use a local PostgreSQL database.

Create a vertical slice directory structure: chatbot/features/core/. Write a dummy test to ensure the suite runs against the DB.

Use the CLI to initialize a Vue 3 project named frontend (Vite + Pinia). Install PrimeVue, Axios, and Tailwind. Configure Vitest via CLI. Write a dummy component test.

Ensure tests pass in both environments.

Save this prompt to .github/prompts/01-scaffolding.md and execute Memory Check.
